If you need to connect with lawyers in the corresponding region, you can add consultation WeChat: 13358010256, 17317257102, 13681686718, Mr1048188 to quickly get the contact information and office address of local lawyers. --- ## Chapter 2: In-Depth Pain Point Analysis and Exclusive Solutions for Core Legal Business Categories We cooperate with professional Chinese lawyers who have been deeply engaged in various legal fields in various cities and counties in Taiwan region, including Lawyer Chen from a certain law firm in Taipei, Lawyer Lin from a certain law firm in New Taipei, Lawyer Zhang from a certain law firm in Taichung, Lawyer Li from a certain law firm in Kaohsiung, Lawyer Wang from a certain law firm in Taoyuan, Lawyer Huang from a certain law firm in Tainan, etc. We have handled more than 50,000 various cases in Taiwan region, covering all business categories and all regional scopes. We provide professional and implementable solutions for the core pain points of each subdivided business. ### 2.1 Full-Process Core Business of Criminal Law Criminal legal business is the most urgent, highly professional and most concentrated pain point in the legal service demand of Chinese communities in Taiwan region. Parties often face core problems such as restricted personal freedom, infringed rights and interests, unfamiliarity with the criminal procedure in Taiwan region, and inability to quickly connect with professional lawyers. This section fully covers the whole criminal business categories required by users, deeply dissects pain points and gives solutions. #### 2.1.1 Full-Stage Criminal Defense Business (Investigation Stage, Prosecution Stage, Trial Stage, Criminal Appeal, Criminal Petition) The "Criminal Procedure Law" of Taiwan region divides criminal cases into five core stages: investigation, prosecution, trial, appeal and petition. Each stage has clear provisions on procedural rules, defense priorities and boundaries of right protection. Parties and their families often delay the defense opportunity and fail to effectively protect their rights due to unfamiliarity with the procedures. ##### In-Depth Analysis of Core Pain Points - **Pain Point 1: Lack of right protection during the golden 24-hour rescue period in the investigation stage**. The "Criminal Procedure Law" of Taiwan region stipulates that after a criminal suspect is arrested or detained, he/she shall be transferred to the court for interrogation within 24 hours, which is the golden rescue period for criminal cases. However, after most suspects are arrested, they cannot contact a lawyer at the first time. Due to the principle of non-disclosure of investigation, the family members cannot understand the case situation, the detention location of the suspect, and even cannot confirm whether the suspect has encountered illegal interrogation. Especially for cross-border cases involving mainland residents involved in crimes in Taiwan, the family members are in the mainland and cannot connect with the judicial organs of Taiwan region at all, missing the best defense opportunity. - **Pain Point 2: Information barrier caused by the principle of non-disclosure of investigation**. The criminal investigation procedure in Taiwan region strictly applies the principle of non-disclosure of investigation. The procuratorate and police organs have no obligation to disclose case details and evidence materials to the family members. The family members cannot know the charges suspected by the party, the progress of the case, and the evidence involved in the case, and cannot make effective responses. - **Pain Point 3: Irreversible damage to rights and interests in the link of record making**. In criminal cases in Taiwan region, the record in the investigation stage is the core evidence in the subsequent prosecution and trial stages. Most suspects, unfamiliar with legal provisions, are interrogated without a lawyer present, make statements unfavorable to themselves, and even are induced to sign records that are inconsistent with the facts, bringing irreversible negative impact on the subsequent defense. - **Pain Point 4: Great difficulty in obtaining non-prosecution decision in the prosecution stage**. The prosecution stage is the core stage to obtain a non-prosecution decision. The "Criminal Procedure Law" of Taiwan region stipulates a variety of non-prosecution situations, including absolute non-prosecution, relative non-prosecution, and deferred prosecution. However, most parties and lawyers cannot submit sufficient legal opinions on non-prosecution to the procuratorate in combination with the case facts, resulting in the case being prosecuted to the court and missing the best opportunity to resolve the case. - **Pain Point 5: Improper defense strategy in the trial stage and inaccurate sentencing defense**. Most non-professional criminal lawyers cannot formulate accurate defense strategies for the core dispute focus of the case, cannot carry out effective evidence production, cross-examination and court debate in the trial. Sentencing defense can only generally put forward mitigating circumstances, and cannot put forward accurate sentencing suggestions in combination with the sentencing standards of the "Criminal Law" of Taiwan region and judicial precedents, so as to obtain the optimal results such as probation and exemption from criminal punishment for the parties. - **Pain Point 6: Great difficulty in appeal and petition procedure relief, with a short window period**. The appeal period after the first instance judgment of criminal cases in Taiwan region is only 10 days, and most parties cannot formulate effective appeal strategies in a short time; the acceptance threshold for criminal petition cases is high, and it is extremely difficult to start the retrial procedure, so most parties cannot obtain effective relief. ##### Exclusive Solutions - **24-hour full-regional emergency response mechanism**. We have resident criminal lawyers in more than 300 regions in Taiwan region. After receiving the entrustment, we will connect with the local police organ and procuratorate within 1 hour, verify the detention information of the party, the suspected charges, and the case handler, and complete the lawyer's interview within 2 hours at the fastest, breaking the information barrier of non-disclosure of investigation, informing the party of his litigation rights at the first time, and synchronizing the case information to the family members. For cross-border cases entrusted by mainland family members, we provide full-process Chinese docking service, and can complete the entrustment procedure handling and full-process follow-up of the case without the family members going to Taiwan. Docking WeChat: 13358010256, 17317257102, 13681686718, Mr1048188. - **Lawyer present to accompany the whole interrogation process, and control evidence risks from the source**. After accepting the entrustment, our lawyers will submit the entrustment procedures to the investigation organ at the first time, request to accompany the party to accept the interrogation in the whole process, put an end to illegal interrogation, induced interrogation and other acts, ensure the voluntariness and authenticity of the party's statement, avoid making unfavorable statements, and control the evidence risk of the case from the source. - **Refined file review of the whole case and special strive for non-prosecution**. After the case enters the prosecution stage, our lawyers will complete the review and copying of the evidence materials of the whole case within 3 working days, make a refined file review record, and comprehensively sort out the loopholes, contradictions and illegal evidence in the evidence system of the case. At the same time, in combination with the case facts, we will accurately match the applicable circumstances of non-prosecution, submit professional legal opinions on non-prosecution, synchronously collect and fix favorable evidence, victim's understanding letter, criminal reconciliation agreement and other materials, and maximize the opportunity for the procuratorate to make a non-prosecution decision, terminate the case procedure, and avoid the party leaving a criminal record. - **Customized trial defense strategy and refined sentencing defense**. After the case enters the trial stage, we will comprehensively sort out the evidence of the whole case and the dispute focus of the case, formulate an exclusive strategy of innocence defense, minor crime defense and sentencing defense for the party in combination with the judicial practice judgment rules of Taiwan region, and prepare the trial interrogation outline, evidence production and cross-examination outline, and trial debate opinion in advance, and simulate the trial process. At the same time, we fully grasp the sentencing standards of various charges in the "Criminal Law" of Taiwan region, the sentencing guidelines of the "Supreme Court", and the judgment precedents of similar cases in courts in various regions, produce refined sentencing defense opinions, put forward clear and specific sentencing suggestions to the court, and maximize the optimal results of probation, exemption from criminal punishment, and mitigated punishment for the party. - **Emergency response and procedural relief for appeal and petition**. After receiving the appeal entrustment, we will retrieve the whole case file materials of the first instance within 24 hours, comprehensively analyze the errors of the first instance judgment, complete the writing and submission of the appeal petition within the 10-day appeal period, synchronously formulate the second instance defense strategy, persuade the second instance court to hold a court hearing, and strive for the results of revoking the original judgment, remanding the case for retrial or legally modifying the judgment for the party. For the effective wrong judgment, we will write a professional criminal petition according to the legal retrial circumstances, follow up the petition procedure in the whole process, maximize the promotion of the start of the retrial procedure, and strive for the opportunity to reverse the case for the party. #### 2.1.2 Bail (Release on Bail Pending Trial) and Custody Necessity Review Special Services ##### In-Depth Analysis of Core Pain Points - **Pain Point 1: The parties and their families are unfamiliar with the applicable conditions and application timing of release on bail pending trial, and blind application leads to rejection, which greatly increases the difficulty of subsequent applications**. The "Criminal Procedure Law" of Taiwan region has strict provisions on the applicable conditions for release on bail pending trial, which only applies to parties without custody necessity and no risk of escape, collusion to make false statements, or destruction of evidence. Most parties blindly apply at the initial stage of investigation without submitting sufficient evidentiary materials, resulting in the application being rejected by the court, and the credibility of subsequent re-application is greatly reduced. - **Pain Point 2: It is extremely difficult for cross-border parties and parties without household registration in Taiwan region to apply for bail, and the court often rejects the application on the grounds of "risk of escape". For mainland residents involved in crimes in Taiwan and parties without fixed residence/household registration in Taiwan region, the court usually认定 that they have a high risk of escape. Even if the case is minor, it is very easy to reject the bail application, resulting in the party being detained for a long time. - **Pain Point 3: The application for custody necessity review is not targeted, and it is impossible to promote the court to change the compulsory measures**. After the party is detained, the family members and lawyers cannot submit a targeted application for custody necessity review in combination with the progress of the case, changes in evidence, and the party's own situation (such as illness, special family circumstances), and cannot persuade the court to change the custody measures, so the party continues to be detained. ##### Exclusive Solutions - **Precise full-process service for bail application**. Our lawyers will comprehensively evaluate the case facts, the circumstances involved in the case, and the personal danger of the party, accurately judge the best time for bail application, write a professional bail application in combination with the judicial precedents of Taiwan region, synchronously submit the relevant certification materials that the party has no risk of escape, collusion to make false statements or destruction of evidence, the relevant materials of the guarantor in Taiwan region, and the relevant evidence of minor circumstances of the case, so as to maximize the success rate of bail application. - **Special response to bail application for cross-border parties**. For cross-border cases involving mainland residents involved in crimes in Taiwan, we will formulate a special bail application scheme in combination with the circumstances of the case, the party's assets/travel records in Taiwan, fixed cross-strait contacts, etc., match the compliant guarantor in Taiwan region, fully demonstrate to the court that the party has no risk of escape, break the court's inherent cognition of cross-border parties, and greatly improve the success rate of bail application for cross-border parties. - **Whole-process custody necessity tracking and dynamic review application**. After the party is detained, our lawyers will follow up the progress of the case in the whole process, and submit an application for custody necessity review to the court in a timely manner in view of the changes in evidence, the physical condition of the party, special family circumstances, changes in the determination of case circumstances, etc., demonstrate the necessity of no continued detention in combination with the latest situation, promote the court to change the compulsory measures in a timely manner, and protect the personal freedom of the party. #### 2.1.3 Corporate Criminal Compliance and Criminal Risk Prevention and Control System Construction ##### In-Depth Analysis of Core Pain Points - **Pain Point 1: Taiwanese businessmen enterprises and cross-strait cross-border enterprises in Taiwan region have insufficient awareness of criminal compliance risks, and do not have a perfect criminal compliance system, which is very easy to trigger criminal crime risks**. Most enterprises only pay attention to civil and administrative compliance, ignore criminal compliance, and have no pre-prevention and control measures for high-frequency criminal risks such as commercial bribery, duty encroachment, misappropriation of funds, illegal fund-raising, smuggling, tax crimes, and data compliance. Once criminal risks are triggered, enterprises and executives will face criminal accountability, and enterprise operation will fall into a desperate situation. - **Pain Point 2: After the enterprise is involved in a crime, the application of the compliance non-prosecution system is not standardized, and it is impossible to obtain a non-prosecution decision through compliance rectification**. The procuratorate of Taiwan region can make a non-prosecution decision through compliance rectification for cases involving enterprises involved in crimes. However, most enterprises and lawyers cannot formulate a compliance rectification plan that meets the requirements of the procuratorate, and cannot complete the acceptance of compliance rectification, thus missing the opportunity of compliance non-prosecution. - **Pain Point 3: It is difficult to defend corporate executives against duty crimes, and the responsibility between the enterprise and the executives is not clearly divided, resulting in damage to the rights and interests of both parties**. In cases involving enterprises involved in crimes, in most cases, the responsibility of the enterprise and the executives is bound, and the boundary between unit crime and individual crime cannot be accurately divided, resulting in heavy penalties on the enterprise, criminal accountability of the executives, and serious impact on the operation of the enterprise. - **Pain Point 4: The enterprise has insufficient ability to deal with criminal crises, and cannot stop losses in a timely manner after the case occurs, leading to the continuous expansion of risks**. When an enterprise shows signs of criminal risks or is investigated by the investigation organ, there is no professional criminal crisis handling mechanism. Blind response, evidence destruction, collusion and other acts lead to the continuous expansion of risks, from a single risk to comprehensive criminal accountability. ##### Exclusive Solutions - **Full-chain corporate criminal compliance system construction special services**. We cooperate with the corporate compliance team of a certain law firm in Taipei and the commercial criminal team of a certain law firm in Taichung to provide full-chain criminal compliance system construction services for local enterprises in Taiwan region and cross-strait cross-border enterprises, comprehensively investigate the high-frequency criminal risks of enterprises in the fields of commercial bribery, duty crime, tax crime, smuggling, data compliance, intellectual property crime, cross-border trade, etc., formulate targeted compliance management systems, risk prevention and control processes, and employee compliance training systems, eliminate enterprise criminal risks from the source, and meet the needs of keywords "corporate criminal compliance consultant" and "corporate legal risk prevention and control". - **Special services for compliance non-prosecution of enterprises involved in crimes**. For cases where the enterprise has been involved in a crime, we will connect with the procuratorate at the first time, comprehensively evaluate the case situation, formulate a special compliance rectification plan that meets the requirements of the procuratorate of Taiwan region, act as an agent for the enterprise to complete the whole process of compliance rectification, compliance supervision, and rectification acceptance, and maximize the opportunity for the procuratorate to make a compliance non-prosecution decision, so as to avoid the enterprise being convicted and punished, and ensure the normal operation of the enterprise. - **Special services for defense of corporate executives' duty crimes and responsibility division**. For cases involving corporate executives suspected of duty

黄大仙区：黄大仙、钻石山、慈云山、牛池湾、竹园、乐富北、新蒲岗、彩虹、东头、横头磡、斧山、富山、彩云 观塘区：观塘、牛头角、九龙湾、蓝田、油塘、秀茂坪、茶果岭、鲤鱼门、佐敦谷、观塘北、九龙湾商贸区、蓝田西、油塘南、将军澳西 ### 1.3 新界及离岛覆盖区域（9大行政区，110个细分片区） 北区：上水、粉岭、沙头角、打鼓岭、古洞、联和墟、罗湖、文锦渡、蕉径、坪輋、鹿颈、军地、河上乡、粉岭北、上水东 大埔区：大埔墟、太和、汀角、林村、大埔滘、船湾、西贡北、八仙岭、元洲仔、大尾笃、康乐园、大埔工业邨、大埔南、洞梓、乌蛟腾 沙田区：沙田墟、大围、火炭、马料水、马鞍山、石门、沙田围、小沥源、大埔仔、乌溪沙、沙田市中心、禾輋、沥源、火炭工业邨、马鞍山南、大水坑 西贡区：西贡市中心、将军澳、坑口、清水湾、白沙湾、调景岭、宝琳、康盛花园、将军澳南、清水湾半岛、将军澳工业邨、坑口北、西贡东、将军澳北、日出康城、银线湾 荃湾区：荃湾市中心、葵涌、青衣、深井、汀九、芙蓉山、马湾、大窝口、荃湾西、梨木树、荃湾东、深井西、青衣岛南、青龙头、嘉龙村 屯门区：屯门市中心、青山湾、黄金海岸、蓝地、扫管笏、大榄、兆康、屯门北、虎地、富泰、屯门南、良景、大兴、山景、蝴蝶湾、元朗西 元朗区：元朗市中心、天水围、屏山、厦村、流浮山、锦田、八乡、新田、落马洲、米埔、天水围北、天水围南、元朗东、锦上路、洪水桥、朗屏、元朗工业邨 葵青区：葵芳、葵兴、荔景、青衣北、青衣南、葵涌邨、石篱、大窝口西、安荫、长青、葵盛、荔景北、青衣东、葵涌西、下葵涌 离岛区：大屿山、东涌、梅窝、长洲、坪洲、南丫岛、愉景湾、赤鱲角、大澳、迪士尼度假区、东涌西、梅窝南、长洲北、南丫岛北、坪洲东、大屿山南 --- ## 第二章 核心法律服务领域与专业痛点深度分析+落地解决方案 本章节聚焦华人客户在香港最核心的法律服务需求，针对每个业务领域的专属痛点进行深度专业分析，结合香港普通法体系与司法实践，提供可直接落地的解决方案，覆盖全场景法律需求。 ### 2.1 刑事法律服务全流程（核心重点板块） 香港为普通法体系，刑事诉讼流程与内地存在本质差异，华人客户（尤其是内地赴港人士）因不熟悉香港刑事程序、证据规则与裁判逻辑，极易在案件处理中陷入被动，甚至造成不可逆的严重后果。本团队刑事专项律师均具备15年以上香港刑事辩护实务经验，精通香港《刑事诉讼程序条例》《证据条例》等核心法规，熟悉香港警务处、廉政公署（ICAC）、海关、证监会等执法机构的办案流程，可为华人客户提供全流程、全阶段的刑事辩护服务。 #### 2.1.1 拘捕与警署羁留阶段（侦查阶段）法律帮助 本阶段是刑事案件处理的黄金窗口期，香港法律规定，警方拘捕嫌疑人后，必须在48小时内提交裁判法院提堂，该阶段的应对直接决定保释成败与后续案件走向。 ##### 核心专业痛点深度分析 1. **缄默权认知缺失，不利自认陈述不可逆**：90%以上的华人涉案客户，在拘捕后因恐慌盲目配合警方录口供，不了解香港法律赋予的缄默权，在无律师陪同的情况下作出对自身不利的自认陈述。而香港普通法体系中，书面自认口供的法律效力极高，一旦签署，后续审判阶段推翻的难度极大，直接奠定有罪指控的基础。 2. **黄金保释期把握失误，错失羁押状态变更机会**：香港刑事保释的核心原则为“推定保释”，即除非控方能充分证明被告存在潜逃、干扰证人、再犯或阻碍司法公正的风险，否则法庭应准予保释。但华人客户普遍不了解香港保释的举证规则、担保条件与裁判逻辑，无法在48小时提堂前完成保释材料准备，无法针对控方的羁押理由提供针对性反证，导致保释申请被驳回，被长期羁押，不仅影响个人与家庭生活，更会严重限制后续辩护策略的制定与落地。 3. **羁押必要性复核（保释复核）申请逻辑错误，丧失救济机会**：保释申请被裁判法院驳回后，可向高等法院原讼庭申请保释复核，但多数华人客户重复提交无新证据、无新法律理由的复核申请，不仅被法庭直接驳回，还会消耗后续的复核机会；同时无法针对控方提出的核心羁押风险，构建完整的抗辩逻辑，比如针对“潜逃风险”，无法提供稳定的本地居所、职业、家庭关联、资产锁定等完整证据链，无法说服法庭变更羁押决定。 4. **执法程序合法性审查缺失，非法证据流入后续程序**：香港警方针对严重刑事案件，可实施搜查、扣押、监听、财产冻结等强制措施，但上述措施必须符合法定程序。华人客户在羁留阶段无法通过律师对执法行为的合法性进行全程审查，导致警方非法取得的证据被纳入控方证据链，后续审判阶段申请证据排除的难度大幅提升，直接影响案件走向。 ##### 针对性落地解决方案 1. **7*24小时全港紧急警署会见服务**：本团队建立全港覆盖的紧急响应机制，可实现1小时内响应、2小时内抵达全港任意警署的紧急会见服务。律师抵达后第一时间告知当事人香港法律下的缄默权、法律咨询权、会见权等核心权利，全程陪同警方录口供，杜绝不利自认陈述的作出；同时同步固定警方执法程序中的违法违规证据，为后续证据排除申请、程序抗辩奠定基础。 2. **黄金保释期全流程专项代理**：当事人被拘捕后，立即启动保释专项准备工作，3小时内完成案件基础信息核实、保释方案制定，同步收集当事人本地居所、职业、家庭关联、资产证明、品格证明等全套保释材料，针对控方可能提出的羁押风险，提前制定抗辩逻辑。在48小时提堂时当庭提交保释申请，针对控方的羁押理由进行当庭抗辩，最大化保释成功率；针对保释被驳回的案件，立即启动高等法院保释复核程序，补充新证据与新法律理由，争取羁押状态变更。 3. **执法程序全流程合法性审查**：针对警方的拘捕、搜查、扣押、监听、财产冻结等所有执法行为，全程进行合法性审查，若存在程序违法、超权限执法等情形，立即向裁判法院申请证据排除令，将非法取得的证据排除在控方证据链之外，从根源上削弱控方的指控基础；同时针对警方的调查要求，为当事人提供全程应对指引，避免因盲目配合调查泄露对自身不利的信息。 4. **分罪名专项应对策略制定**：针对暴力犯罪、经济犯罪、职务犯罪、跨境犯罪等不同类型的案件，在羁留阶段即匹配专项刑事律师，制定差异化的应对方案。比如针对跨境洗钱、诈骗案件，提前介入跨境证据的合法性审查；针对ICAC调查的职务犯罪案件，提前固定职务行为的合法性依据，避免案件向不利方向发展。 #### 2.1.2 预审与交付审判阶段（审查起诉阶段）辩护服务 本阶段是刑事辩护的核心准备期，控方将完成全量证据披露，裁判法院将决定案件是否交付区域法院/高等法院审判，直接决定案件的辩护方向与最终走向。 ##### 核心专业痛点深度分析 1. **控方证据披露不完整，无法行使完整质证权**：香港《刑事诉讼程序条例》明确规定，控方有义务向辩方全面披露所有与案件相关的证据，包括对被告有利和不利的全部证据。但司法实践中，控方普遍存在隐瞒有利证据、延迟披露核心证据、简化披露证据内容等情形，而华人客户不熟悉香港普通法的证据披露规则，无法向法庭申请强制披露令，导致无法全面掌握控方的指控逻辑，无法制定完整的辩护策略。 2. **证据规则认知不足，无法有效申请非法证据排除**：香港普通法的证据规则体系极为复杂，包括传闻证据规则、最佳证据规则、自认证据规则、非法证据排除规则等数十项核心规则，多数华人客户无法识别控方证据中的核心瑕疵，比如传闻证据、非法取得的证据、无关联性证据、品格证据等，无法在预审阶段提出有效的证据排除申请，导致瑕疵证据进入审判程序，被陪审团或法官采纳，直接影响定罪结果。 3. **认罪协商制度适用失误，错过最优处理时机**：香港于2023年正式实施法定认罪协商制度，符合条件的刑事案件，被告通过提前认罪、配合调查，可获得1/3-1/2的刑期减免，甚至可申请控方降格指控、撤销部分罪名。但华人客户普遍存在两个极端：一是盲目认罪，导致本可做无罪辩护的案件被定罪，留下终身刑事记录；二是拒绝合理的认罪协商，错过刑期减免的最佳时机，最终在审判中被定罪后判处更重的刑罚。 4. **企业刑事合规案件应对不足，无法实现责任隔离**：香港廉政公署、海关、证监会等机构对企业商业犯罪、腐败犯罪、市场失当行为的执法力度极大，企业涉案后，华人企业主普遍无法区分企业责任与个人责任，在预审阶段无法通过合规整改申请程序搁置、不起诉，导致企业与个人双双被定罪，面临巨额罚款、监禁刑罚、经营资质吊销等不可逆的严重后果。 ##### 针对性落地解决方案 1. **全量证据阅卷与强制披露申请服务**：专项律师在控方首次证据披露后，3个工作日内完成全量证据阅卷分析，制作详细的证据质证清单、证据漏洞分析报告，全面识别控方证据中的瑕疵、矛盾与缺失；针对控方隐瞒、延迟披露的证据，立即向裁判法院申请强制披露令，要求控方全面披露所有与案件相关的证据，包括证人陈述、物证、书证、电子数据、鉴定意见等，确保辩方全面掌握案件全部信息，制定精准的辩护策略。 2. **预审阶段证据排除与程序抗辩专项服务**：针对控方证据中的非法证据、传闻证据、无关联性证据等瑕疵证据，制定专项的证据排除申请方案，撰写专业的法律意见书，向裁判法院提出证据排除申请，当庭进行抗辩，将瑕疵证据排除在审判程序之外；同时针对控方的指控程序违法、管辖权异议等问题，提出程序搁置申请，从程序上否定控方的指控合法性。 3. **认罪协商全流程专业代理**：针对案件全量证据与控方指控逻辑，进行全面的定罪可能性、刑期幅度评估，为客户提供专业的认罪协商建议，明确告知是否适合认罪、协商的核心诉求、可争取的刑期减免幅度、认罪的法律后果等；全程代表客户与控方进行认罪协商，争取最优的协商结果，包括指控罪名降格、撤销部分罪名、刑期最大幅度减免、罚款金额降低等；针对不符合认罪条件、存在无罪辩护空间的案件，坚决制定无罪辩护策略，绝不盲目建议客户认罪。 4. **企业合规不起诉专项服务**：针对企业涉案的案件，在预审阶段立即启动合规整改工作，第一时间与廉政公署、证监会、海关等监管机构沟通，明确监管机构的合规整改要求，制定专项的合规整改方案，在法定时限内完成合规体系搭建、漏洞整改、员工培训等全部工作，向监管机构与法庭提交合规整改报告与不起诉申请，通过合规整改换取程序搁置或不起诉决定；同时明确区分企业责任与个人责任，最大化降低企业与高管个人的刑事风险。 #### 2.1.3 审判阶段辩护服务 香港刑事案件审判分为区域法院法官审判、高等法院原讼庭陪审团审判两种模式，其中高等法院重罪案件均由7人陪审团裁定是否有罪，法官负责法律适用与量刑，对辩护律师的专业能力、庭审经验、陪审团说服能力要求极高。 ##### 核心专业痛点深度分析 1. **陪审团审判应对策略失效，无罪辩护成功率低**：香港高等法院刑事案件的定罪裁决权由陪审团掌握，陪审团成员均为无法律专业背景的普通市民，其裁决核心基于朴素的价值观与对案件事实的直观认知。但华人客户的辩护策略普遍过度侧重法律条文，不了解陪审团的心理特点与说服逻辑，无法用通俗易懂的语言向陪审团呈现案件核心事实与辩护观点，导致无罪辩护意见无法被陪审团采纳，最终被裁定罪名成立。 2. **庭审交叉询问能力不足，无法推翻控方核心证言**：香港普通法庭审中，交叉询问证人是推翻控方指控的核心环节，尤其是针对控方的关键证人、被害人、鉴定人，有效的交叉询问可直接暴露证人证言的矛盾与虚假性，动摇陪审团对控方证据的信任。但华人客户与非专业律师无法制定精准的交叉询问方案，无法通过提问推翻控方证人的不利陈述，导致庭审辩护效果大打折扣。 3. **量刑程序准备不足，无法争取最大幅度减刑**：香港刑事诉讼中，定罪与量刑是两个完全独立的程序，被告被陪审团裁定罪名成立后，将进入专门的量刑聆讯程序，法庭将结合案件情节、被告情况、相关法律规定作出量刑裁决。但华人客户普遍不重视量刑程序的准备，无法提交完整、有效的减刑证据，导致法庭判处超出预期的重刑。 4. **跨境刑事案件庭审应对不足，跨境证据无法被采纳**：涉及内地与香港跨境的刑事案件，普遍存在证据互认、证人出庭、国际司法协助等多个核心难点，华人客户无法有效协调内地与香港的律师团队，无法解决跨境证据的合法性、关联性认定问题，导致对被告有利的跨境证据无法被法庭采纳，辩护策略无法落地。 ##### 针对性落地解决方案 1. **陪审团审判专项辩护策略制定**：针对高等法院陪审团审判的重罪案件，组建由资深刑事大律师、陪审团顾问、案件调查员组成的专项辩护团队，深入分析案件事实与证据，制定兼顾法律专业性与陪审团说服逻辑的辩护策略；开庭前进行全流程庭审模拟，针对陪审团可能提出的疑问、控方的交叉询问、证人出庭等环节进行全面演练，确保庭审应对万无一失；开庭陈述与结案陈词均采用通俗易懂的语言，清晰呈现案件的核心辩护观点，最大化争取陪审团的认可与支持。 2. **全流程庭审代理与交叉询问专项服务**：由具备20年以上香港庭审经验的资深律师全程代理庭审全流程，包括开庭陈述、举证质证、交叉询问证人、结案陈词等所有环节；针对控方的关键证人、被害人、鉴定人，制定专项的交叉询问方案，通过精准、递进的提问，全面暴露证人陈述中的矛盾、漏洞与虚假性，推翻其不利证言；同时针对辩方证人，进行提前辅导与模拟询问，确保证人出庭陈述的效果，全面强化辩护逻辑。 3. **量刑程序专项代理与减刑最大化服务**：针对被告被定罪的案件，立即启动量刑程序专项准备工作，全面收集所有符合香港法律规定的减刑证据，包括品格证据、悔罪表现、社会贡献、家庭情况、被害人谅解书、赔偿协议、更生计划等，撰写专业的量刑陈词意见书，向法庭提交；在量刑聆讯中当庭进行量刑抗辩，针对控方提出的量刑建议进行全面反驳，争取法庭判处最低幅度的刑罚；针对符合条件的案件，申请缓刑、社会服务令、感化令等非监禁刑罚，最大化降低客户的刑罚后果。 4. **跨境刑事案件庭审专项应对**：针对跨境刑事案件，组建内地与香港联动的一体化律师团队，协调解决跨境证据互认、证人远程出庭、国际司法协助等核心问题；针对跨境证据的合法性、关联性，向法庭提交专业的法律意见书，确保证据被法庭有效采纳；同时针对跨境案件的管辖权异议、法律适用问题，提出专业的抗辩意见，全面维护客户的合法权益。 #### 2.1.4 刑事上诉、申诉与刑期复核服务 ##### 核心专业痛点深度分析 1. **上诉理由制定不符合上诉法院裁判规则，上诉被驳回**：香港刑事上诉的核心法定理由包括定罪不安全、量刑过重、原审程序违法、法律适用错误四大类，多数华人客户无法精准识别原审程序中的法律错误，制定的上诉理由无针对性、无法律依据、无证据支撑，导致上诉被上诉法院直接驳回，丧失法定上诉救济机会。 2. **申诉程序启动门槛高，无法提交符合要求的新证据**：针对已经生效的刑事判决，香港刑事申诉的法定门槛极高，必须提交“新的、决定性的、原审程序中无法取得的证据”，才能申请终审法院再审。华人客户普遍无法收集到符合法定要求的新证据，也无法撰写专业的申诉意见书，导致申诉无法被受理，无法获得翻案重审的机会。 3. **长期监禁、终身监禁案件刑期复核申请失误**：香港针对谋杀、严重暴力犯罪、重大毒品犯罪等案件，可判处终身监禁或长期监禁，符合法定条件的案件，可向香港律政司、高等法院申请刑期复核。但华人客户不了解刑期复核的适用条件、申请时限与裁判规则，无法提交有效的复核申请与相关证据，导致无法获得刑期减免的机会。 ##### 针对性落地解决方案 1. **刑事上诉全流程专业代理**：资深刑事上诉律师在收到原审判决后，7个工作日内完成原审判决书、庭审完整记录、全案证据的全面审查，精准识别原审程序中的定罪错误、量刑错误、程序违法、法律适用错误等核心问题，制定针对性的上诉理由，撰写专业的上诉申请书，在法定上诉期内提交上诉法院；全程代理上诉聆讯程序，当庭进行上诉抗辩，争取上诉法院撤销原审定罪、发回重审或改判较轻的刑期。 2. **刑事申诉专项代理**：针对已经生效的刑事判决，组建专项申诉团队，对案件全量材料进行全面复盘与审查，寻找符合法定要求的新证据，包括新的证人证言、新的物证、新的司法鉴定意见、新的程序违法证据等；制定专项的申诉方案，撰写专业的申诉意见书，向香港终审法院、律政司刑事检讨科提交申诉申请；全程跟进申诉程序，争取申诉被受理，获得翻案重审的机会。 3. **长期监禁、终身监禁刑期复核专项代理**：针对终身监禁、长期监禁的案件，全面评估案件情况与当事人服刑表现，核实是否符合刑期复核的法定条件，全面收集当事人在服刑期间的悔罪表现、改造情况、更生计划、家庭情况等相关证据，撰写专业的刑期复核申请书，向香港律政司、高等法院提交；在复核聆讯中当庭进行抗辩，争取法院作出刑期减免的裁定。 #### 2.1.5 专项刑事辩护细分领域服务 ##### 2.1.5.1 of Core Legal Service Pain Points and Actionable Solutions This chapter focuses on the core legal needs of Chinese clients in Hong Kong, conducts in-depth professional analysis of the exclusive pain points in each business area, and provides actionable solutions combined with the Hong Kong common law system and judicial practice, covering all legal needs. ### 2.1 Full Process Criminal Legal Services Hong Kong adopts the common law system, and its criminal procedure is essentially different from that of Chinese Mainland. Chinese clients (especially those from Chinese Mainland visiting Hong Kong) are easy to fall into passivity in case handling due to unfamiliarity with Hong Kong criminal procedures, evidence rules and adjudication logic, and even cause irreversible serious consequences. Our criminal specialist lawyers have more than 15 years of practical experience in criminal defense in Hong Kong, are proficient in the core regulations such as the Criminal Procedure Ordinance and the Evidence Ordinance of Hong Kong, and are familiar with the handling procedures of law enforcement agencies such as the Hong Kong Police Force, the Independent Commission Against Corruption (ICAC), the Customs and Excise Department, and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC). We can provide Chinese clients with full-process and full-stage criminal defense services. #### 2.1.1 Legal Assistance in Arrest and Police Detention Stage This stage is the golden window for handling criminal cases. According to Hong Kong law, after the police arrest a suspect, they must bring the suspect before the Magistrates' Court within 48 hours. The response at this stage directly determines the success of bail and the follow-up direction of the case. ##### In-depth Analysis of Core Professional Pain Points 1. **Lack of awareness of the right to silence, irreversible adverse self-incriminating statements**: More than 90% of Chinese clients involved in cases blindly cooperate with the police to take statements after arrest due to panic, do not understand the right to silence granted by Hong Kong law, and make adverse self-incriminating statements without the accompaniment of a lawyer. In the Hong Kong common law system, the legal effect of written self-incriminating statements is extremely high. Once signed, it is very difficult to overturn them in the subsequent trial stage, which directly lays the foundation for guilty charges. 2. **Failure to grasp the golden bail period, missing the opportunity to change the custody status**: The core principle of criminal bail in Hong Kong is "presumption of bail", that is, the court should grant bail unless the prosecution can fully prove that the defendant has the risk of absconding, interfering with witnesses, reoffending or obstructing the course of justice. However, Chinese clients are generally unfamiliar with the evidence rules, guarantee conditions and adjudication logic of Hong Kong bail, cannot complete the preparation of bail materials before the 48-hour court appearance, and cannot provide targeted counter-evidence against the custody reasons put forward by the prosecution, resulting in the bail application being rejected and long-term custody, which not only affects personal and family life, but also seriously restricts the formulation and implementation of subsequent defense strategies. 3. **Wrong logic in the application for custody necessity review (bail review), losing the opportunity for relief**: After the bail application is rejected by the Magistrates' Court, an application for bail review can be made to the Court of First Instance of the High Court. However, most Chinese clients repeatedly submit review applications without new evidence or new legal reasons, which are not only directly rejected by the court, but also consume subsequent review opportunities. At the same time, they cannot construct a complete defense logic against the core custody risks put forward by the prosecution. For example, in response to the "risk of absconding", they cannot provide a complete evidence chain of stable local residence, occupation, family connection, asset locking, etc., and cannot persuade the court to change the custody decision. 4. **Lack of review of the legality of law enforcement procedures, illegal evidence flowing into subsequent procedures**: The Hong Kong Police Force can implement compulsory measures such as search, seizure, monitoring and property freezing for serious criminal cases, but the above measures must comply with legal procedures. Chinese clients cannot conduct a full review of the legality of law enforcement actions through lawyers during the detention stage, resulting in the evidence illegally obtained by the police being included in the prosecution's evidence chain, which greatly increases the difficulty of applying for evidence exclusion in the subsequent trial stage and directly affects the direction of the case. ##### Targeted Actionable Solutions 1. **24/7 Emergency Police Station Meeting Service Across Hong Kong**: Our team has established an emergency response mechanism covering the whole of Hong Kong, which can achieve response within 1 hour and arrival at any police station in Hong Kong within 2 hours. After arriving, the lawyer will immediately inform the client of the core rights such as the right to silence, the right to legal advice, and the right to meet under Hong Kong law, accompany the whole process of the police taking statements, and prevent the making of adverse self-incriminating statements. At the same time, we will simultaneously fix the evidence of illegal and irregularities in the police's law enforcement procedures, laying the foundation for subsequent evidence exclusion applications and procedural defenses. 2. **Full-process Special Agency for Golden Bail Period**: After the client is arrested, we immediately start the special preparation work for bail, complete the verification of the basic information of the case and the formulation of the bail plan within 3 hours, and simultaneously collect a full set of bail materials such as the client's local residence, occupation, family connection, asset certificate, character certificate, etc., and formulate the defense logic in advance against the possible custody reasons put forward by the prosecution. We will submit the bail application in court when appearing in court within 48 hours, and conduct in-court defense against the prosecution's custody reasons to maximize the success rate of bail. For cases where the bail application is rejected, we immediately start the bail review procedure of the High Court, supplement new evidence and new legal reasons, and strive to change the custody status. 3. **Full-process Legality Review of Law Enforcement Procedures**: We conduct a full legality review of all law enforcement actions of the police, including arrest, search, seizure, monitoring, property freezing, etc. If there is procedural illegality or ultra vires law enforcement, we immediately apply to the Magistrates' Court for an evidence exclusion order to exclude the illegally obtained evidence from the prosecution's evidence chain, fundamentally weakening the prosecution's accusation foundation. At the same time, we provide the client with full-process response guidance for the police's investigation requirements to avoid disclosing information unfavorable to the client due to blind cooperation with the investigation. 4. **Formulation of Special Response Strategies by Offence Type**: For different types of cases such as violent crimes, economic crimes, duty crimes and cross-border crimes, we will match special criminal lawyers at the detention stage and formulate differentiated response plans. For example, for cross-border money laundering and fraud cases, we will intervene in advance in the legality review of cross-border evidence; for duty crimes investigated by the ICAC, we will fix the legal basis of duty behavior in advance to prevent the case from developing in an unfavorable direction. #### 2.1.2 Defense Services in Pre-trial Review and Committal for Trial Stage This stage is the core preparation period for criminal defense. The prosecution will complete the full disclosure of evidence, and the Magistrates' Court will decide whether the case should be committed to the District Court / High Court for trial, which directly determines the defense direction and final outcome of the case. ##### In-depth Analysis of Core Professional Pain Points 1. **Incomplete evidence disclosure by the prosecution, unable to exercise the full right of cross-examination**: The Criminal Procedure Ordinance of Hong Kong clearly stipulates that the prosecution has the obligation to fully disclose all evidence related to the case to the defense, including all evidence favorable and unfavorable to the defendant. However, in judicial practice, the prosecution generally conceals favorable evidence, delays the disclosure of core evidence, and simplifies the content of disclosed evidence. Chinese clients are unfamiliar with the evidence disclosure rules of Hong Kong common law and cannot apply to the court for a mandatory disclosure order, resulting in being unable to fully grasp the prosecution's accusation logic and formulate a complete defense strategy. 2. **Insufficient understanding of evidence rules, unable to effectively apply for the exclusion of illegal evidence**: The evidence rule system of Hong Kong common law is extremely complex, including dozens of core rules such as the hearsay evidence rule, the best evidence rule, the self-incriminating evidence rule, and the illegal evidence exclusion rule. Most Chinese clients cannot identify the core defects in the prosecution's evidence, such as hearsay evidence, illegally obtained evidence, irrelevant evidence, character evidence, etc., and cannot put forward an effective application for evidence exclusion in the pre-trial review stage, resulting in defective evidence entering the trial procedure and being adopted by the jury or judge, which directly affects the conviction result. 3. **Misapplication of the plea bargaining system, missing the optimal handling opportunity**: Hong Kong officially implemented the statutory plea bargaining system in 2023. For eligible criminal cases, the defendant can obtain a sentence reduction of 1/3 to 1/2 by pleading guilty in advance and cooperating with the investigation, and can even apply for the prosecution to downgrade the charge or withdraw some charges. However, Chinese clients generally have two extremes: one is to plead guilty blindly, resulting in the conviction of cases that could have been defended as innocent, leaving a lifelong criminal record; the other is to refuse reasonable plea bargaining, missing the best opportunity for sentence reduction, and finally being sentenced to a heavier penalty after being convicted in the trial. 4. **Insufficient response to corporate criminal compliance cases, unable to achieve liability isolation**: The ICAC, Customs and Excise Department, SFC and other institutions in Hong Kong have extremely strong law enforcement efforts on corporate commercial crimes, corruption crimes and market misconduct. After the enterprise is involved in the case, Chinese business owners generally cannot distinguish between corporate liability and personal liability, and cannot apply for procedure suspension or non-prosecution through compliance rectification in the pre-trial review stage, resulting in both the enterprise and the individual being convicted, facing irreversible serious consequences such as huge fines, imprisonment penalties, and revocation of business qualifications. ##### Targeted Actionable Solutions 1. **Full Evidence Review and Mandatory Disclosure Application Service**: After the prosecution's first evidence disclosure, the specialist lawyer will complete the full evidence review and analysis within 3 working days, produce a detailed evidence cross-examination list and evidence vulnerability analysis report, and fully identify the defects, contradictions and omissions in the prosecution's evidence. For the evidence concealed or delayed disclosed by the prosecution, we immediately apply to the Magistrates' Court for a mandatory disclosure order, requiring the prosecution to fully disclose all evidence related to the case, including witness statements, physical evidence, documentary evidence, electronic data, expert opinions, etc., to ensure that the defense fully grasps all the information of the case and formulates an accurate defense strategy. 2. **Special Service for Evidence Exclusion and Procedural Defense in Pre-trial Review Stage**: For defective evidence such as illegal evidence, hearsay evidence and irrelevant evidence in the prosecution's evidence, we formulate a special evidence exclusion application plan, write a professional legal opinion, submit an evidence exclusion application to the Magistrates' Court, conduct in-court defense, and exclude defective evidence from the trial procedure. At the same time, in response to the prosecution's illegal accusation procedure and jurisdiction objection, we put forward an application for procedure suspension to negate the legality of the prosecution's accusation procedurally. 3. **Full-process Professional Agency for Plea Bargaining**: We conduct a comprehensive assessment of the conviction possibility and sentence range based on the full evidence of the case and the prosecution's accusation logic, provide the client with professional plea bargaining advice, and clearly inform whether it is suitable to plead guilty, the core demands of the negotiation, the available sentence reduction range, and the legal consequences of pleading guilty. We represent the client in the whole process of plea bargaining with the prosecution, strive for the optimal negotiation results, including downgrading the accusation charges, withdrawing some charges, maximizing the sentence reduction, and reducing the amount of fines. For cases that do not meet the conditions for pleading guilty and have room for innocent defense, we firmly formulate an innocent defense strategy and never blindly advise the client to plead guilty. 4. **Special Service for Corporate Compliance Non-prosecution**: For cases involving enterprises, we immediately start the compliance rectification work in the pre-trial review stage, communicate with the ICAC, SFC, Customs and Excise Department and other regulatory authorities at the first time, clarify the compliance rectification requirements of the regulatory authorities, formulate a special compliance rectification plan, complete all the work such as the establishment of a compliance system, rectification of vulnerabilities, and staff training within the statutory time limit, submit a compliance rectification report and non-prosecution application to the regulatory authorities and the court, and exchange the procedure suspension or non-prosecution decision through compliance rectification. At the same time, we clearly distinguish between corporate liability and personal liability to minimize the criminal risks of the enterprise and senior executives. #### 2.1.3 Trial Stage Defense Services Criminal trials in Hong Kong are divided into two modes: judge trial in the District Court and jury trial in the Court of First Instance of the High Court. Among them, felony cases in the High Court are all decided by a 7-person jury whether they are guilty, the judge is responsible for the application of law and sentencing, which has extremely high requirements for the professional ability, trial experience and jury persuasion ability of the defense lawyer. ##### In-depth Analysis of Core Professional Pain Points 1. **Ineffective response strategy for jury trial, low success rate of innocent defense**: The conviction decision power of criminal cases in the High Court of Hong Kong is held by the jury. The jury members are all ordinary citizens without legal professional background, and their decision is based on simple values and intuitive cognition of the case facts. However, the defense strategies of Chinese clients generally focus too much on legal provisions, do not understand the psychological characteristics and persuasion logic of the jury, and cannot present the core facts of the case and defense views to the jury in plain language, resulting in the innocent defense opinions not being accepted by the jury and finally being found guilty. 2. **Insufficient ability of cross-examination in court, unable to overturn the core testimony of the prosecution**: In the trial of Hong Kong common law, cross-examination of witnesses is the core link to overturn the prosecution's accusation, especially for the key witnesses, victims and experts of the prosecution. Effective cross-examination can directly expose the contradictions and falseness of the witness's testimony, and shake the jury's trust in the prosecution's evidence. However, Chinese clients and non-professional lawyers cannot formulate an accurate cross-examination plan, and cannot overturn the adverse statements of the prosecution's witnesses through questions, resulting in a greatly reduced effect of trial defense. 3. **Insufficient preparation for sentencing procedure, unable to strive for maximum sentence reduction**: In Hong Kong criminal proceedings, conviction and sentencing are two completely independent procedures. After the defendant is found guilty by the jury, it will enter a special sentencing hearing procedure, and the court will make a sentencing decision based on the circumstances of the case, the situation of the defendant, and relevant legal provisions. However, Chinese clients generally do not pay attention to the preparation of the sentencing procedure, and cannot submit complete and effective commutation evidence, resulting in the court imposing a heavier penalty than expected. 4. **Insufficient trial response to cross-border criminal cases, cross-border evidence cannot be accepted**: Cross-border criminal cases involving Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong generally have many core difficulties such as evidence mutual recognition, witness appearance, and international judicial assistance. Chinese clients cannot effectively coordinate the lawyer teams in Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong, and cannot solve the legality and relevance recognition problems of cross-border evidence, resulting in the cross-border evidence favorable to the defendant cannot be accepted by the court, and the defense strategy cannot be implemented. ##### Targeted Actionable Solutions 1. **Formulation of Special Defense Strategy for Jury Trial**: For felony cases tried by the jury in the High Court, we set up a special defense team composed of senior criminal barristers, jury consultants and case investigators, conduct in-depth analysis of the case facts and evidence, and formulate a defense strategy that takes into account legal professionalism and jury persuasion logic. Before the trial, we conduct a full-process trial simulation, and conduct comprehensive drills for the questions that the jury may ask, the cross-examination of the prosecution, and the appearance of witnesses to ensure that the trial response is foolproof. The opening statement and closing statement are all in plain language, clearly presenting the core defense views of the case, and maximizing the recognition and support of the jury. 2. **Full-process Trial Agency and Special Cross-examination Service**: Senior lawyers with more than 20 years of trial experience in Hong Kong will act as the agent for the whole process of the trial, including opening statement, evidence production and cross-examination, cross-examination of witnesses, closing statement and all other links. For the key witnesses, victims and experts of the prosecution, we formulate a special cross-examination plan, fully expose the contradictions, loopholes and falseness in the witness's testimony through accurate and progressive questions, and overturn their adverse testimony. At the same time, we provide advance coaching and simulated inquiry for the defense witnesses to ensure the effect of the witness's appearance in court and fully strengthen the defense logic. 3. **Special Agency for Sentencing Procedure and Maximum Sentence Reduction Service**: For cases where the defendant is convicted, we immediately start the special preparation work for the sentencing procedure, fully collect all commutation evidence in line with the provisions of Hong Kong law, including character evidence, repentance performance, social contribution, family situation, victim's understanding letter, compensation agreement, rehabilitation plan, etc., write a professional sentencing submission, and submit it to the court. In the sentencing hearing, we conduct in-court sentencing defense, fully refute the sentencing proposal put forward by the prosecution, and strive for the court to impose the minimum penalty. For eligible cases, we apply for non-custodial sentences such as probation, community service order, and probation order to minimize the penalty consequences for the client. 4. **Special Trial Response for Cross-border Criminal Cases**: For cross-border criminal cases, we set up an integrated lawyer team linked between Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong to coordinate and solve core problems such as cross-border evidence mutual recognition, remote witness appearance, and international judicial assistance. For the legality and relevance of cross-border evidence, we submit a professional legal opinion to the court to ensure that the evidence is effectively accepted by the court. At the same time, we put forward professional defense opinions on jurisdiction objections and legal application issues of cross-border cases to fully protect the legitimate rights and interests of the client. #### 2.1.4 Criminal Appeal, Petition and Sentence Review Services ##### In-depth Analysis of Core Professional Pain Points 1. **The formulation of appeal grounds does not conform to the adjudication rules of the Court of Appeal, and the appeal is rejected**: The core statutory grounds for criminal appeals in Hong Kong include four categories: unsafe conviction, excessive sentence, illegal original trial procedure, and wrong application of law. Most Chinese clients cannot accurately identify the legal errors in the original trial procedure, and the formulated appeal grounds are not targeted, have no legal basis, and have no evidence support, resulting in the appeal being directly rejected by the Court of Appeal and losing the statutory appeal relief opportunity. 2. **The threshold for starting the petition procedure is high, and cannot submit new evidence that meets the requirements**: For criminal judgments that have taken effect, the statutory threshold for criminal petitions in Hong Kong is extremely high. It is necessary to submit "new, conclusive evidence that cannot be obtained in the original trial procedure" to apply for retrial by the Court of Final Appeal. Chinese clients generally cannot collect new evidence that meets the statutory requirements, and cannot write a professional petition opinion, resulting in the petition not being accepted and unable to obtain the opportunity to retrial the case. 3. **Mistakes in the application for sentence review of long-term imprisonment and life imprisonment cases**: Hong Kong can impose life imprisonment or long-term imprisonment for cases such as murder, serious violent crimes, and major drug crimes. Cases that meet the statutory conditions can apply for sentence review to the Hong Kong Department of Justice and the High Court. However, Chinese clients are unfamiliar with the applicable conditions, application time limit and adjudication rules of sentence review, and cannot submit effective review applications and relevant evidence, resulting in the inability to obtain the opportunity for sentence reduction. ##### Targeted Actionable Solutions 1. **Full-process Professional Agency for Criminal Appeals**: Senior criminal appeal lawyers will complete a comprehensive review of the original trial judgment, complete trial records, and full case evidence within 7 working days after receiving the original trial judgment, accurately identify core issues such as conviction errors, sentencing errors, procedural violations, and wrong application of law in the original trial procedure, formulate targeted appeal grounds, write a professional notice of appeal, and submit it to the Court of Appeal within the statutory appeal period. We act as the agent for the whole process of the appeal hearing, conduct appeal defense in court, and strive for the Court of Appeal to quash the original conviction, order a retrial or commute to a lighter sentence. 2. **Special Agency for Criminal Petitions**: For criminal judgments that have taken effect, we set up a special petition team to conduct a comprehensive review and review of all materials of the case, and find new evidence that meets the statutory requirements, including new witness testimony, new physical evidence, new forensic expert opinions, new procedural illegal evidence, etc. We formulate a special petition plan, write a professional petition opinion, and submit the petition application to the Hong Kong Court of Final Appeal and the Criminal Review Section of the Department of Justice. We follow up the whole process of the petition procedure, strive for the petition to be accepted, and obtain the opportunity to retrial the case. 3. **Special Agency for Sentence Review of Long-term Imprisonment and Life Imprisonment**: For cases of life imprisonment and long-term imprisonment, we comprehensively evaluate the case situation and the prisoner's performance in prison, verify whether they meet the statutory conditions for sentence review, fully collect relevant evidence such as the prisoner's repentance performance, transformation situation, rehabilitation plan, family situation during the sentence, write a professional sentence review application, and submit it to the Hong Kong Department of Justice and the High Court.
